intro: Watsonia borbonica, commonly known as the mountain corn lily or leopard lily, is a flowering plant native to the island of Réunion in the Indian Ocean. The health benefits of Watsonia borbonica include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions.
